user.title: Home Assistant Cloud Setup
user.description: Connect your Home Assistant to Durin cloud backend via MQTT for device synchronization and remote control.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthorize Home Assistant Cloud
reauth_confirm.description: Your MQTT credentials need to be updated. Please provide valid credentials.

error.mqtt_auth_failed: MQTT authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
error.mqtt_connection_failed: Unable to connect to the MQTT broker. Please check your network connection and broker settings.
error.broker_unreachable: MQTT broker is unreachable. Please verify the broker address and port.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

init.title: Cloud Integration Options
init.description: Configure advanced options for the MQTT cloud integration.

sync_devices.name: Sync Devices
sync_devices.description: Manually sync all devices and entities with the cloud backend.

send_command.name: Send Command
send_command.description: Send a command to a specific entity through the cloud.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity to send the command to.

action.name: Action
action.description: The action to perform (e.g., turn_on, turn_off, set_brightness).

params.name: Parameters
params.description: Additional parameters for the command as a JSON object.

cloud_connection_failed.title: Cloud Connection Failed
cloud_connection_failed.description: The connection to the MQTT broker has failed. Please check your network connection and MQTT configuration.

sync_failed.title: Device Sync Failed
sync_failed.description: Unable to sync devices with the cloud backend via MQTT. The integration will retry automatically.

mqtt_auth_failed.title: MQTT Authentication Failed
mqtt_auth_failed.description: Your MQTT credentials are invalid or have been revoked. Please update your configuration with valid credentials.
